overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character moves from a narrow wet alley with vibrant yellow and cyan neon lighting into an open plaza with trees, then crosses an urban street. The environment features cyberpunk architecture, holographic advertisements, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with overhead neon lighting

events.description: ground surface transitions from wet asphalt to metal grating flooring

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow wet alley, passing pedestrians on both sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera down the alley center

entered.detail: continuous yellow neon light tube running along the right wall at eye level
green neon sign reading 'Dime a Buzz' on the left wall
illuminated vending machine with red and yellow signage
large suspended digital screen displaying advertisements above the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, dominated by a bright yellow neon strip running along the right wall. The ground is wet asphalt reflecting the neon glow. The player walks forward past a 'Dime a Buzz' sign and vending machine on the left, encountering occasional pedestrians. Around 15 seconds, the floor transitions to metal grating.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with metal flooring and Japanese neon signage

events.description: exits the covered alley into the open plaza with visible trees

agents.ego_description: continuing through the metal-floored alley, approaching the open plaza exit ahead

notable_agents.action: person standing near the Rulai restaurant entrance looking at the menu

entered.detail: perforated metal flooring covering the entire alley ground
purple neon sign with 'Rulai' and Chinese characters above a restaurant entrance
cluster of hanging neon signs with Japanese characters in pink and blue

segments.scene_description: Walking through the latter section of the alley with distinctive metal grating underfoot. The Rulai restaurant with its prominent purple neon signage appears on the right. Japanese neon signs hang overhead. The segment ends as the alley opens into a wider plaza with trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with trees and surrounding digital billboards

events.description: turns right to follow the path through the plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right in the open plaza, walking past trees and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the plaza edge near the building

entered.detail: large leafy trees growing in raised planters in the urban plaza
tall building facade covered with multiple large digital advertisement screens
raised circular beds with grass around the tree bases

segments.scene_description: Having exited the narrow alley, the scene opens into a spacious urban plaza with trees and grass planters. The camera turns right, revealing a large building covered in digital billboards on the left. The area is moderately populated with pedestrians walking in various directions, and the lighting shifts from enclosed neon to mixed outdoor ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with crosswalk and tall cyberpunk architecture

events.description: crossing the street at the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk, moving between other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: zebra crossing lines painted on the asphalt road surface
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents in the background
tall modern street light illuminating the crosswalk area

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera crossing an urban street at a marked crosswalk. The plaza trees fall behind as the scene shifts to a street environment with tall cyberpunk towers visible in the background. Street lamps provide artificial lighting, and pedestrians move together across the road. The digital billboards from the previous segment are now visible in the distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-drenched alleyway into a wide, open urban plaza and across a busy city street. It begins by moving forward through a narrow corridor of wet asphalt and bright yellow neon, passing a vending machine and a Dime a Buzz sign before the ground transitions into industrial metal grating. As the camera continues, the environment shifts toward purple neon signage and overhead Japanese displays, eventually breaking out of the enclosed alley into a spacious plaza filled with trees and grass planters. The scene then expands further as the camera turns right toward a building draped in digital billboards, moving through a crowd of pedestrians under mixed ambient light. Finally, the perspective shifts across a marked crosswalk, leaving the greenery behind to reveal towering cyberpunk skyscrapers and artificial street lamps under the night sky.
